rows.description: Computus Thomas Stinton Coll. Exon. Rectoris a 2do Novr is 1795 ad eundem diem revolution 1796
rows.notes: Top-of-page title in Latin script. Handwriting mostly legible but several abbreviations (Novr, ad eundem) and flourishes make a fully 'crystal-clear' rating inappropriate.
rows.section_header: Computus Thomas Stinton Coll. Exon. Rectoris a 2do Novr is 1795 ad eundem diem revolution 1796

rows.notes: Section heading below title. The word appears to be Latin ('Arrearagia recepta' / 'Arrearagia recep ta'); legible but slightly stylised.
Clear description and well-aligned amount in the three right-hand columns: 152 pounds, 17 shillings, 0 pence. Vertical ruling alignment unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Arrears of annual rent from South Newington Rectory.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of annual rent from South Newington Rectory, amounting to £152 17s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of annual rent from Riddington Mills, amounting to £17 2s 10½d.
